title: Interpret Container Selection Colors And Locate A Tote Or Rack Entry
summary: Use the Container Selection screen to determine whether a rack location contains an AG tote or is empty, and locate a tote by entering a location or tote/container number and selecting the returned rack or AGV location.
when_to_use: Use when viewing the Container Selection screen to interpret rack occupancy states or to look up where a tote is located by location or tote/container number.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer meanings for colors or icons beyond what the source states.
Do not use this procedure as authorization to remove AGVs or remove items directly in this interface on an active system.
Do not use this as a full end-to-end operating workflow; the source supports interpretation and lookup behavior only.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Container Selection screen, interpret the documented color states, enter a location or tote/container number, and review the returned rack or AGV selection result.

safety_notes: The related training frame warns that on an active system one of the worst actions is removing an AGV.
Not all users have credentials for all actions; the artifact notes operators should not have access while supervisors may.
Direct customers to approved tools such as AVEVA or the portal/hospital workflow rather than removing items directly in this interface when that caution applies.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen
Visual access to rack color states and selection results
Location number or tote/container number to search

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: The Container Selection screen is available for viewing.
A location number or tote/container number is available if lookup is needed.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Container Selection view for totes/containers and the documented color meanings and lookup behavior.

steps.title: Open or view the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Access the screen used to interpret rack occupancy and perform tote/location lookup.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Container Selection screen for totes/containers.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows the totes/container view used for rack state interpretation and lookup.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen is not available or cannot be viewed.

actions.label: View Container Selection screen
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Container Selection screen for totes/containers.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Container Selection screen cannot be accessed or does not match the documented screen context.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR indicates a Container Selection screen where dark blue shows presence of an AG tote, light blue shows an empty rack, and users can find a tote by typing a location or number.

steps.title: Interpret rack color state
steps.purpose: Determine whether a rack location contains an AG tote or is empty using the documented color mapping.
steps.instruction: Observe the rack color state on the screen and compare it to the documented color meanings: dark blue indicates the presence of an AG tote, and light blue indicates an empty rack.
steps.expected_result: The rack state is interpreted using the documented color meanings.
steps.healthy_condition: Dark blue is read as AG tote present and light blue is read as empty rack.
steps.failure_condition: The display does not match the documented color meanings or the state cannot be interpreted from the screen.

actions.label: Check rack color
actions.exact_action: Observe the rack color state on the screen and compare it to the documented color meanings: dark blue indicates the presence of an AG tote, and light blue indicates an empty rack.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Screen area showing dark blue and light blue rack states.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen display does not match the documented color meanings.
Additional color meanings or icon meanings would need to be inferred beyond what the source states.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR indicates a Container Selection screen where dark blue shows presence of an AG tote, light blue shows an empty rack, and users can find a tote by typing a location or number.
Dark blue indicates the presence of an AG tote, while light blue represents an empty rack.

steps.title: Enter a location or tote number for lookup
steps.purpose: Search for the rack or AGV associated with a known location or tote/container number.
steps.instruction: If you need to find a tote, type the location or number into the screen's lookup field using the source-described location or tote/container number entry.
steps.expected_result: The entered location or tote/container number is accepted for lookup.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen allows entry of a location or tote/container number for search.
steps.failure_condition: The screen does not accept the entered value or no lookup behavior is available.

actions.label: Enter lookup value
actions.exact_action: Type the location or number into the screen's lookup field using the source-described location or tote/container number entry.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Search or entry field on the Container Selection screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not return a rack or AGV location for the entered value.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR indicates a Container Selection screen where dark blue shows presence of an AG tote, light blue shows an empty rack, and users can find a tote by typing a location or number.
The related training frame shows a Container Selection screen for totes and containers, including visual rack states and a way to find a tote by typing a location or number.

steps.title: Select the returned rack or AGV location
steps.purpose: Open the location result associated with the entered lookup value.
steps.instruction: Select the rack or AGV location returned by the screen for the entered location or number.
steps.expected_result: The selected rack or AGV location is displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: A rack or AGV location corresponding to the entered value can be selected.
steps.failure_condition: No rack or AGV location is returned or the result cannot be selected.

actions.label: Select returned location
actions.exact_action: Select the rack or AGV location returned by the screen for the entered location or number.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Returned rack or AGV location associated with the entered value.

stop_or_escalate_if: No rack or AGV location is returned for the entered value.
The returned result cannot be selected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR indicates a Container Selection screen where dark blue shows presence of an AG tote, light blue shows an empty rack, and users can find a tote by typing a location or number.

steps.title: Verify the selected result details
steps.purpose: Confirm the selected location shows the tote indicators described by the source.
steps.instruction: Verify whether a box icon appears and whether the tote number is shown after selection, as described in the source.
steps.expected_result: The selected result shows the expected box icon and tote number when applicable.
steps.healthy_condition: After selection, a box icon appears and the tote number is shown as described by the source.
steps.failure_condition: The expected box icon or tote number is not shown after selection when a result should be present.

actions.label: Verify box icon and tote number
actions.exact_action: Verify whether a box icon appears and whether the tote number is shown after selection, as described in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Selected rack or AGV result showing a box icon and tote number.

stop_or_escalate_if: The selected result does not show the expected box icon or tote number.
The screen behavior does not match the documented selection result.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR indicates a Container Selection screen where dark blue shows presence of an AG tote, light blue shows an empty rack, and users can find a tote by typing a location or number.

success_criteria: The user can identify whether a rack location is occupied or empty using the documented color meanings.
The user can enter a location or tote/container number and identify the rack or AGV associated with that value.
The selected result shows the expected tote-identifying details described by the source when applicable.
healthy_conditions: Dark blue indicates the presence of an AG tote.
Light blue indicates an empty rack.
A location or tote/container number can be entered for lookup.
Selecting the returned rack or AGV shows the expected result details, including a box icon and tote number when described by the source.
failure_conditions: The screen display does not match the documented color meanings.
The screen does not return a rack or AGV location for the entered value.
The selected result does not show the expected box icon or tote number.
The user would need to infer additional meanings for colors or icons beyond what the source states.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the screen display does not match the documented color meanings or does not return a rack or AGV location for the entered value.
Stop and seek guidance if the interface behavior differs from the training source.
Do not perform removal actions in this interface based on this reference; use approved tools/workflows noted in the source context when applicable.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen showing rack color states, lookup entry, and selected result details.

missing_details: The source does not provide a precise navigation path to open the Container Selection screen.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this reference task.
The source does not define additional role boundaries beyond operator-level use and cautionary access notes.
The source does not provide explicit field names for the lookup entry box.
The source does not provide a full end-to-end operating workflow beyond interpretation and lookup behavior.
